description_long: This is a large, luxurious two-story house with a symmetrical front facade, featuring a prominent central section with tall windows and a decorative balcony. The exterior is clad in light gray siding with white trim, and the roof is a blue-gray gable style with multiple peaks. The front yard is enclosed by a black and white fence and includes landscaped gardens, a circular patio, and a swimming pool with a curved edge. The rear of the house has a three-car garage and a formal entryway with columns and a small portico. Multiple balconies and large windows provide ample natural light and views of the surrounding grounds. The property is designed for upscale residential living, with outdoor seating areas and detailed landscaping.
description: A grand, two-story luxury house with a blue-gray gable roof, large windows, balconies, landscaped gardens, and a swimming pool, all enclosed by a decorative fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with tall windows, central balcony, landscaped gardens, and a swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved balconies, large windows, and the pool area wrapping around the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the three-car garage, formal entryway with columns, and a more utilitarian driveway area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional garden features, a circular patio, and the side balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large central windows and bay windows on the sides
attribute_entryway_design: Formal entryway with double doors, columns, a small portico, and decorative trim
